text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey isn't feeling well, so I take her to
the infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worrying you. The infirmary has
everything I could need, so all I have to do is rest.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What... is this place? The air is so suffocating.

text_block_list.name: Azure Dragon and White Tiger
text_block_list.text:
Gwaooo...
Meeeow...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh? A small dragon and... a white tiger? Wh-what
are these little creatures?!

text_block_list.name: Shadow Feng Shui Master
text_block_list.text: MUWAHAHA! I am the shadow feng shui master!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The shadow feng shui master?!

text_block_list.name: Shadow Feng Shui Master
text_block_list.text:
I've disturbed the dragon veins and scattered
their qi, weakening the power of the Four
Guardians! Once I defeat you, the world will be
mine!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Using feng shui to cause suffering is unforgivable!
Everyone, hang on a little longer! I'm going to
save you!

text_block_list.name: Shadow Feng Shui Master
text_block_list.text: As if I'd let you! HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah!

...key, Rickey. Remember... Do not fear
misfortune...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
"Learn how to bring about fortune." That's it!
You're absolutely right, Dragon God!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I can just realign the disturbed qi and channel it
into my body... Feng shui, lend me your power!

text_block_list.name: Shadow Feng Shui Master
text_block_list.text:
Th-this can't be! The power of the Four Guardians
is returning... ARGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: A dream?! Haaa... My heart is pounding!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Don't fear misfortune, huh? Hehe, it feels like a
weight has been lifted off my shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Azure Dragon and White Tiger
text_block_list.text: Gwaaao!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Everyone! No! You have to get out of the way!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A dr-dream?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: If only I'd been in good health, I could've surely done better... dream or not! Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to deal with the problem in her dream, a
gloomy Copano Rickey fails to get any rest.
